chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-37 & 38 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on urgent application (s) 2. For order on limitation application (s) 3. For order on restoration application 24.10.2025 Ms.Sania Abbasi, Advocate for petitioner a/w petitioner ******** 1. Granted. 2&3. Petitioner Mst. Reema Bibi, bearing CNIC No. 37405-8223258-4, is present along with her counsel. The record reflects that these petitions were dismissed on 02.11.2023 for non-prosecution, whereafter the listed applications were moved seeking restoration. Now, under instructions, learned counsel for the petitioner does not wish to press the listed applications. Accordingly, the same are dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
